zh.lifeSummary: 當Baldwin de Montfort於大約1358年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親John Montfort28歲，母親Joan Clinton22歲。他於1374年之前與Margaret Clinton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1385年在西班牙享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baldwin de Montfort于大约1358年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲John Montfort28岁，母亲Joan Clinton22岁。他于1374年之前与Margaret Clinton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1385年在西班牙享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Baldwin de Montfort was born about 1358, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Montfort, was 28 and his mother, Joan Clinton, was 22. He married Margaret Clinton before 1374, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1385, in Spain, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baldwin de Montfort est né environ 1358, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Montfort, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Joan Clinton, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Clinton avant 1374, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1385, à Espagne, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baldwin de Montfort um 1358 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Montfort 28 und seine Mutter Joan Clinton 22. Er hat vor 1374 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1385 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin de Montfort è nato il circa 1358 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Montfort, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Joan Clinton, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Clinton prima del 1374, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1385, nel Spagna, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Montfortが約1358年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Montfortは28歳，母Joan Clintonは22歳であった。1374年以前にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1385年にスペインで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baldwin de Montfort(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Montfort(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Clinton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1374년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1385년 스페인에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baldwin de Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Montfort, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Joan Clinton, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Clinton antes 1374, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1385, em Espanha, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baldwin de Montfort родился около 1358 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Montfort было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Clinton, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Clinton перед 1374 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1385 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baldwin de Montfort nació aproximadamente 1358, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Montfort, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Joan Clinton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Clinton antes de 1374, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1385, en España, a la edad de 29 años.
